content, know, where it, like when it was published and like how big of a priority it could be.

Because.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy progress and align on priorities for Diligent's SEO and content efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is focusing on a content audit and blog cleanup to optimize crawl budget and improve organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Product page optimization and ranking improvement identified as key priorities](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [New LLM visibility tool (Crunch) implemented to track Diligent's presence in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Content refresh process starting, with initial feedback needed from Diligent team](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit and Unified View

  - [Created unified content view in ContentOS, combining data from 2021-2025](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Identified blogs losing traffic for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Recommended actions: merge, prune, refresh, or keep content](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Found 404 errors, likely from migration; provided redirect recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics and Goals

  - [North Star: Increase qualified organic traffic from 30% to 50%](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Focus on ranking improvement and attracting the right target audience](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Product page ranking identified as an area of weakness](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Aim to improve product page rankings and generate qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### Content Strategy Enhancements

  - [Recommendation: Implement drag-and-drop CTAs in Sanity CMS for product pages](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Keep governance blogs for non-board customers (local governments, school boards, non-profits)](https://fathom.video/share/QpGDWQkuR8aPotcBHG8R2RzxrZ-xxtVV?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
